name: rangerai-agent
description: RangerAI WebSocket Agent Backend with Smart Routing

scripts.test: node --test tests/knowledge-injector.test.mjs tests/segmenter.test.mjs tests/workflow-scheduler.test.mjs && npx vitest run tests/auth.test.mjs tests/bootstrap.test.mjs tests/db-connectivity.test.mjs tests/e2e-health.test.mjs tests/http-routes.test.mjs tests/logger.test.mjs tests/metrics-collector.test.mjs tests/startup-check.test.mjs tests/ws-connection.test.mjs tests/ws-server.test.mjs tests/api-integration.test.mjs
scripts.test:native: node --test --test-force-exit tests/knowledge-injector.test.mjs tests/segmenter.test.mjs tests/stream-processor.test.mjs tests/format-utils.test.mjs tests/workflow-scheduler.test.mjs tests/knowledge-module.test.mjs tests/planner-contract.test.mjs tests/failure-recovery.test.mjs tests/event-schema.test.mjs tests/ctxmgr-smoke.test.mjs tests/db-health.test.mjs tests/circuit-breaker-smoke.mjs tests/handle-parallel-wave-smoke.mjs tests/sub-agent-orchestrator-smoke.mjs tests/task-workspace-smoke.mjs
